description.ko: 세포막을 통한 생체 발광 영양분의 유동적 교환을 강조하며 유기적 연결성을 거시적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A macroscopic exploration of organic connectivity, highlighting the fluid exchange of bioluminescent nutrients through cellular membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Symbiotic Pulse.' A macroscopic view of a breathing organic landscape where #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes form a network of soft, pulsating chambers. Inside these chambers, #2D5A3D dark forest-green vascular structures anchor the system. The entire entity is submerged in a #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid medium, with #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar flowing like liquid electricity through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic expansion and the glowing exchange of nutrients. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine biological movement.
